VENOM-D1001.title: Missing runtime directive
VENOM-D1001.remediation: Add // @venom: browser or // @venom: protected near the start of the authored module.

VENOM-D1002.title: Conflicting runtime directives
VENOM-D1002.remediation: Keep exactly one file-scope runtime directive.

VENOM-D1101.title: Relative module dependency unresolved
VENOM-D1101.remediation: Correct the import path or add a supported JavaScript/TypeScript module with that basename.

VENOM-D1102.title: Browser module imports protected module
VENOM-D1102.remediation: Ensure the import is an intentional protected-call boundary and exported symbol is supported by the planner.

VENOM-D1201.title: Build evidence missing
VENOM-D1201.remediation: Run a Venom build first or pass --build-report/--performance-report explicitly.

VENOM-D1301.title: Slow build phase
VENOM-D1301.remediation: Inspect cache misses and split or cache the reported phase.

VENOM-D1401.title: Diagnostic contract mismatch
VENOM-D1401.remediation: Regenerate or update diagnostics tooling and contract together.
